examples: He told me I was flat-footed.
He was a nimble-footed boy of ten.
My horse is small but wiry and sure-footed.
Two minutes later, Zardes fired a right-footed blast from 10 yards out that Robles punched aside.
The three-month-old African black-footed penguins, named Bamm-Bamm and Pebbles, are being hand-reared at Whipsnade Zoo.
